input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.10.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.10.4
            TITLE: accumulator container(s) must be securely attached to the hand cart

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.10.4: Accumulator Container(s) must be securely attached to the Hand Cart
EV.4.10.4 Accumulator Container(s) must be securely attached to the Hand Cart

Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Accumulator Container(s) must be securely attached to the Hand Cart
